name: Safety Helmet
purpose: Protection against falling objects and head impact on industrial sites.

name: Safety Belt
purpose: Full-body harness used during work at height to prevent fall injuries.

name: Safety Goggles
purpose: Eye protection from chemical splashes, dust, and sand blasting particles.

name: Safety Shoes
purpose: Steel-toe footwear to protect feet from heavy objects and chemical spills.

name: Safety Gloves
purpose: Chemical-resistant gloves for hand protection during coating and surface treatment.
